<<a journey through time>>  
select title, director from movies  
order by length(title) desc, length(director) desc  

the query ensures that titles are sorted first by their character length in descending order, and if titles have the same length, directors are sorted by their length in descending order. a palindrome is embedded in the response as "the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog"
